children.text: The terms “Armed Forces Retirement Home Trust Fund” and “Fund” mean the Armed Forces Retirement Home Trust Fund established under .section 419(a) of this title
The term “Advisory Council” means the Armed Forces Retirement Home Advisory Council established under .section 416 of this title
The term “Resident Advisory Committee” means an elected body of residents at a facility of the Retirement Home established under .section 416a of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the Deputy Chief of Staff for Personnel of the Army;

children.label: C
children.text: the Deputy Chief of Staff for Personnel of the Air Force;

children.label: D
children.text: the Deputy Commandant of the Marine Corps for Manpower and Reserve Affairs;

children.label: E
children.text: the Assistant Commandant of the Coast Guard for Human Resources; and

children.label: F
children.text: the Deputy Chief of Space Operations for Human Capital of the Space Force.

children.label: A
children.text: The Sergeant Major of the Army.

children.label: B
children.text: The Master Chief Petty Officer of the Navy.

children.label: C
children.text: The Chief Master Sergeant of the Air Force.

children.label: D
children.text: The Sergeant Major of the Marine Corps.

children.label: E
children.text: The Master Chief Petty Officer of the Coast Guard.

children.label: F
children.text: The Chief Master Sergeant of the Space Force.
